archive_trigger_tuesday.condition: Any Batch 5 lead without confirmed LinkedIn (note_sent: true in linkedin_profiles.json)
archive_trigger_tuesday.action: Archive immediately as LOST_NO_RESPONSE. Log CHANGELOG same session.
archive_trigger_tuesday.urgency: Non-negotiable. 51-session failure ends Monday execution or Tuesday EOD archive fires.
archive_trigger_tuesday.context: Warm pipeline failure (leads 1/3/22) wrote off £800-1,175 over 44 sessions. Batch 5 does not repeat this pattern.

pipeline_summary.lesson: LinkedIn must activate within Day 7 of initial email. 51-session delay = archive trigger Tuesday EOD. Hard deadline enforced for every Batch 5 lead — zero tolerance.

pipeline_summary.batch_5_interested_if_monday_reply: If an INTERESTED reply arrives Sunday or Monday morning: 24h SLA for proposal. LinkedIn still proceeds within Day 7. Do not reference email in LinkedIn note.

sunday_monitoring.urgency: High — 48h post-bump is still peak. An INTERESTED reply today enables a Monday morning proposal.

if_interested_reply_sunday.action: Write to data/new_replies.json immediately. Classify in reply_classifications.json as INTERESTED. Begin proposal draft (do not send until Monday morning — but 24h SLA runs from reply time, not from business hours). LinkedIn still valid Monday within Day 7.
if_interested_reply_sunday.sla: 24h from reply time — non-negotiable. Tom (Ripon Road Carpentry) asked for pricing and never got it. That does not repeat.
if_interested_reply_sunday.note: Do NOT reference email in LinkedIn note even if INTERESTED reply received Sunday. Treat LinkedIn as cold approach.

sunday_monitoring.if_unsubscribe: Suppress ALL channels within 24h (GDPR Article 21 — applies 24/7 including Sundays). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG immediately.
